Operation 'getTriviaQuestions' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks details about parameter constraints, return structure, and session token usage. Enhanced version specifies valid parameter ranges, response format, and explains the session token feature for better AI agent decision-making about when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieves trivia questions from the database with optional filters for amount, category, difficulty, type, and encoding.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve trivia questions with optional filters
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves trivia questions from the database. Supports optional filtering by amount (1-50 questions), category ID, difficulty level (easy/medium/hard), question type (multiple choice/true-false), and response encoding (URL/base64). Returns an array of TriviaQuestion objects with question text, correct answer, and incorrect answers. Session tokens can be used to avoid duplicate questions across requests.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks details about parameter constraints, return structure, and session token usage. Enhanced version specifies valid parameter ranges, response format, and explains the session token feature for better AI agent decision-making about when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'manageSessionToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks context about token purpose, return format, and token lifecycle. Enhanced version clarifies the token's role in preventing duplicates, specifies both command options, explains the response structure, and adds important information about token expiration for AI agents to understand token management implications.

data.current_description: Request a new session token (command=request) or reset an existing one (command=reset).
data.description_suggestion: Manages session tokens for tracking question history. Use command=request to obtain a new session token that prevents duplicate questions in subsequent requests. Use command=reset to clear the question history for an existing token. Returns a TokenResponse containing the session token and response code. Session tokens expire after 6 hours of inactivity.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks context about token purpose, return format, and token lifecycle. Enhanced version clarifies the token's role in preventing duplicates, specifies both command options, explains the response structure, and adds important information about token expiration for AI agents to understand token management implications.

message: Operation 'getCategories' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Summary is clear and concise. Description needs enhancement to specify the response structure (category ID and name), explain how to use category IDs with other operations, and clarify the response schema for better AI agent understanding of the returned data format.

data.current_description: Returns all available trivia categories and their IDs.
data.description_suggestion: Returns all available trivia categories with their unique IDs. Each category object contains the category ID and category name. Use category IDs as filters when requesting trivia questions. This operation has no parameters and returns a CategoryListResponse containing the complete list of categories.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and concise. Description needs enhancement to specify the response structure (category ID and name), explain how to use category IDs with other operations, and clarify the response schema for better AI agent understanding of the returned data format.

message: Operation 'getCategoryQuestionCount' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate. Description lacks input parameter details (category ID requirement) and output structure details (breakdown by difficulty and type). Enhanced version specifies the required parameter, explains how to obtain it, details the response structure with difficulty and type breakdowns, and provides context for when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns the number of questions in a specific category.
data.description_suggestion: Returns question count statistics for a specific trivia category. Requires a category ID parameter (obtained from getCategories operation). Returns a CategoryCountResponse containing total questions, easy/medium/hard difficulty breakdowns, and multiple-choice/true-false type breakdowns. Use this to understand category content before requesting questions.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description lacks input parameter details (category ID requirement) and output structure details (breakdown by difficulty and type). Enhanced version specifies the required parameter, explains how to obtain it, details the response structure with difficulty and type breakdowns, and provides context for when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns the total number of questions across all categories and statuses.
data.description_suggestion: Returns aggregate question count statistics across the entire trivia database. Returns a GlobalCountResponse containing total questions verified and unverified. This operation requires no parameters and provides database-wide metrics useful for understanding overall content availability and data quality distribution.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description is vague about response structure and lacks clarity on what 'statuses' means.
